notes: Real child result produced from task-local ideation analysis.
Claim scan found no live CLAIMED or IN_PROGRESS canonical task claims in docs/task_claims at write time.

lane_strategy: Improve the current task path without breaking core assumptions.

model_audit.routing_basis: User-directed real future-branch child execution for T-9013 in Codex.

objective: Explore the highest-leverage minimal-change future for the current ideation problem. Apply that branch specifically to 'Independent Model Inference Microservice Layer'.
one_sentence_thesis: The idea should not become an independent microservice layer; the conservative high-leverage path is a narrow addendum that gives C45 a first-class internal inference-capacity and routing surface while leaving execution authority, membrane control, model promotion, and economics with their current owners.
key_upsides: Closes the remaining gap around internal model-pool scheduling, batching, and route-to-capacity binding without minting a redundant subsystem.
Preserves the existing Alternative C authority split: C45 owns route execution posture, C42 owns priming and handoff, C47 owns native model promotion, and C36 owns external reachability.
Fits the already-budgeted and already-sequenced sovereign compute posture instead of inventing a new platform program.
key_risks: Naming this as an independent microservice layer would drift back toward the old service-plane framing that T-300 bounded as non-forward authority.
A standalone layer could duplicate C45 execution-mode logic or blur C42/C23 authority boundaries.
If exposed directly, it would violate C36's derivative-only membrane posture and invite generic inference service creep.
evidence: docs/specifications/C45 - AACP Sovereign Compiler Framework/C45_AACP_Sovereign_Compiler_Framework_Master_Tech_Spec.md:22-29,59,68,72,153,210-221 - C45 already owns native-vs-leased execution mode, sovereign control-plane mediation, scrubbed leased cognition, and policy-locked route behavior.

docs/specifications/C42 - Lease-Primed Execution Mesh/C42_Lease-Primed_Execution_Mesh_Master_Tech_Spec.md:148-156,227-234,311,427-433,542,560-572 - C42 already owns invocation priming, bounded continuation, and runtime handoff while explicitly refusing to replace runtime lease authority.

docs/specifications/C47 - AACP Automated Cross-Compilation Forge/C47_AACP_Automated_Cross-Compilation_Forge_Master_Tech_Spec.md:27-32,46,173-213,252-259,269-278,307 - C47 already defines the native model adaptation and quarantine-to-promotion path that should feed any internal inference substrate.

docs/specifications/C36 - EMA-I External Integration/C36_EMA-I_External_Integration_Master_Tech_Spec.md:42-50,79-91,185-187,247,520-527,727 - C36 already bounds all external interaction surfaces and permits only bounded derivative enterprise execution, not a generic externally reachable inference layer.

docs/specifications/C39 - AACP Layered Capability Metadata Language/C39_AACP_Layered_Capability_Metadata_Language_Master_Tech_Spec.md:42-46,237-238,377-392,592-616,968-975 - C39 already carries delegated sampling and model-provenance semantics, so a new message-family-level inference subsystem is unnecessary.

docs/specifications/C22 - Implementation Plan/C22_Implementation_Plan_Master_Tech_Spec.md:23,429,939-953,994,1009 - C22 already budgets sovereign compute and bounded leased cognition and still flags full sequencing replacement as future work, which favors a scoped addendum over a new platform lane.

docs/specifications/C18 - Funding Strategy/C18_Funding_Strategy_Master_Tech_Spec.md:37-42,494-512,557-560,793-805 - C18 already treats C45 leased cognition and C47 adaptation/quarantine as first-order operating costs, so the economics exist for an addendum but not for an independently justified subsystem.

docs/task_workspaces/T-300/BOUNDARY_POLICY_DRAFT.md:54-72,106-113,127-128 and docs/task_claims/T-300.yaml:22-24 - T-300 makes Alternative C surfaces the only forward authority and keeps C4-era assumptions only for retrofit, compatibility, and audit, which blocks reviving a historical microservice-style communication frame as a new forward subsystem.
recommended_next_action: If the operator wants to preserve the idea, promote it only as a direct addendum concept: specify an internal inference-capacity surface under C45 with explicit hooks to C42 priming, C47 model-family supply, C22 sequencing, and C18 cost controls. Do not frame it as an independent subsystem.
